props.type: Native input type — text, password, email, number, etc. `password` adds a reveal toggle.
props.label: Field label. Combine with `label-placeholder` for the floating label.
props.labelPlaceholder: Animates the label as a placeholder that floats up on focus.
props.placeholder: Native placeholder (when not using a floating label).
props.color: Focus accent color — a theme color name or any CSS color.
props.variant: Field style — default (filled), underlined, or shadow.
props.clearable: Shows a clear button when the field has a value.
props.block: Stretches the field to the full container width.
props.hint: Helper text shown below the field.
props.persistentHint: Keeps the hint visible even when not focused.
props.rules: Array of validation rules — each returns true or an error message.
props.errorMessages: Force one or more error messages.
props.validateOn: When to validate — input, blur, or submit.
